{"society_power": 8.5, "state_power": 8.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Second Reform Act (1867) doubles electorate; TUC founded", "reasoning": "The 1867 Reform Act, mass extra-parliamentary mobilization (Reform League, Hyde Park), the founding of the TUC, and a freer press all deepened civil society's institutionalized voice, lifting society power modestly; the state remained a mature, professionalizing \"Shackled Leviathan\" with capacity already high and roughly stable."}
